narrative_beat: Medium close-up of modern hooded silhouette P&B facing cracked mirror, reflection shows human face in vibrant rich colors, golden frame

style_reference.textual_description: dark cinematic chiaroscuro, Caravaggio-inspired, foreground in rich warm tones (crimson, amber, gold) with background in desaturated black-and-white, film grain, candlelight, floating orange embers

subject.primary: a modern hooded figure in P&B silhouette seen from behind, facing a cracked antique mirror
subject.focal_point: the reflection in the mirror showing the same person's face in vivid rich warm tones, eyes wide with recognition
subject.secondary: Ornate golden antique mirror frame. Embers floating between figure and mirror.

composition.foreground: golden frame and reflected face in rich warm tones
composition.background: desaturated black-and-white hooded figure and room

lighting.key_light: vertical cold ambient from above on figure, warm glow from mirror reflection
lighting.rim_light: gold rim on mirror frame and reflected cheek

style.post_processing: halation, crushed blacks, amber highlights, anamorphic lens flares
style.texture_detail: 35mm film grain, dust particles, floating orange embers

symbolism.primary: the viewer recognizing the system in their own life

negative_as_positive: clean frame without visible text or watermarks
photorealistic documentary cinematography, not illustrated or cartoon
analog film photography aesthetic, no digital art flatness
muted desaturated background palette, warm saturated foreground only

multimodal_inputs.instruction: Transfer color palette, lighting, grain, atmosphere only. Do not copy composition.
